sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ أَفْرَادُ الأُسْرَةِ فِي رَمَضَانَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Članovi porodice se svaki dan okupljaju u Ramazanu.
sentences.translationEn: Family members gather every day during Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَجْلِسُونَ مَعًا عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ وَيَنْتَظِرُونَ الإِفْطَارَ.
sentences.translation: Sjede zajedno za stolom i čekaju iftar.
sentences.translationEn: They sit together at the table and wait for iftar.
The mother prepares food from the morning.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُونَ التَّمْرَ أَوَّلًا ثُمَّ يَشْرَبُونَ الشُّرْبَةَ.
sentences.translation: Prvo jedu hurme, a zatim piju supu.
sentences.translationEn: They eat dates first, then drink soup.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الجَمِيعُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ فِي هَذَا الوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Svi se osjećaju sretno u ovo vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone feels happy at this time.
